chapter_title.en: The transience of all things and inevitability of events

text: ٧٥. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): كُلُّ مَعْدُود مُنْقَض، وَكُلُّ مُتَوَقَّعٍ آتٍ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 75. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Every countable thing is to pass away and every expected thing must come about.
